title: zeltnera arizonica
intro: Zeltnera arizonica, also known as Arizona penstemon or Arizona zeltnera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Zeltnera arizonica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions.
